lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: It was a warm, sleepless summer's night.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: A short, tired, dreary blink was all the sleep the lawyer had seemed to get for the night.

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: This sucks...

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: It looks like I'm not the only one who can't sleep.

lines.speaker: kilometers ashworth
lines.text: Ah! Mr Wrong. Are you here to get an early start on the case as well?

lines.speaker: kilometers ashworth
lines.text: I'm suprised you were honest. I knew you weren't the type.

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: Uh, excuse me?

lines.speaker: kilometers ashworth
lines.text: So, how are you planning on losing in court today?

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: My client is innocent. That's all I need.

lines.speaker: kilometers ashworth
lines.text: Hmm.

lines.speaker: kilometers ashworth
lines.text: So, how has your preparation on the case been?

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: I can't discuss that.

lines.speaker: kilometers ashworth
lines.text: So you think you have been preparing?

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: Isn't it too early to be this backhanded?

lines.speaker: nick wrong
lines.text: My client is innocent. That's all I need.

ask_note.title: Courtyard - The Note

lines.speaker: alex
lines.text: What did the note say?

lines.speaker: mira
lines.text: Just one sentence: meet me where the bell cannot be heard.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: For a moment, even the morning birds seem to go silent.

ask_note.endText: Scene complete. Add more choices here to keep branching.

walk_together.title: Courtyard - Company

lines.speaker: alex
lines.text: I can walk with you if you want.

lines.speaker: mira
lines.text: I would like that. It makes the halls feel less impossible.

walk_together.endText: Scene complete. This branch can continue into another scene.

leave_for_class.title: Hallway - First Bell

lines.speaker: alex
lines.text: We should get to class before the bell.

lines.speaker: mira
lines.text: Right. Mystery later, attendance first.

leave_for_class.endText: Scene complete. This branch can continue into another scene.
